findings: ✅ Master Key Wrapping architecture correctly implemented
✅ Dual-layer encryption: Password → KEK → Master Key → Files
✅ File encryption/decryption updated to use master key
✅ No password or key material in logs
✅ Proper error messages without leaking crypto details
⚠️ Master key loss = all files lost (mitigated by future Issue #44)
✅ derive_master_key() - Generates master key on first password set
✅ verify_password() - Decrypts master key and loads to memory
✅ encrypt_file() - Uses MasterKeyState, no longer takes password
✅ decrypt_file() - Uses MasterKeyState, no longer takes password
✅ MasterKeyState::set() - Stores decrypted master key in memory
✅ MasterKeyState::get() - Returns SecretKey for file operations
✅ Flow: Password → derive KEK → unwrap master key → use for files
✅ Comprehensive test coverage (6 master key tests + 1 unrelated test)
✅ Edge cases tested: wrong password, missing file, corrupted data
✅ Clear doc comments explaining Master Key Wrapping flow
✅ Error handling with context (file paths, operation types)
⚠️ 2 compiler warnings: unused variable in system_info.rs, unused 'clear' method
✅ No unsafe code, proper Mutex usage for thread safety
✅ KeyStore::load() decrypts master key with password KEK
✅ test_master_key_wrapping_flow - Full flow (password → master key → encrypt/decrypt)

issues.impact: Low - compiler warning, not affecting functionality
Low - may be needed for future logout functionality
None - Pre-existing issue, not introduced by this change

acceptance_criteria.error_handling: ✅ Complete (clear messages for wrong password, missing files)

rules_compliance.tauri_security: ✅ Pass - No secrets in logs, zeroize for memory safety
rules_compliance.secrets: ✅ Pass - No password/key logging, encrypted storage
rules_compliance.diagnostic_export_logging: ✅ Pass - Semantic event names, no sensitive data

recommendation: APPROVE - Ready for merge. Excellent implementation of Master Key Wrapping architecture, comprehensive test coverage (6/7 passing), security best practices followed, ADR properly updated. Minor compiler warnings do not affect functionality.
next_steps: Run cargo clippy --fix to cleanup minor warnings (optional)
